channel.title: summarizedStoriesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Small U.K. Agency That’s a 911 for Ships in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: At a military base outside Portsmouth, England, a 24-hour service monitors the Persian Gulf, the Red Sea and part of the Indian Ocean, responding to d...

item.title: Deadlock over Iran's nuclear program and the Strait of Hormuz cripples peace efforts
item.description: Two months after the U.S.-Israeli attack on Iran started the war, peace talks are on hold, with control of the Strait of Hormuz and the future of Iran...

item.title: Oil Prices Jump Again as U.S.-Iran Talks Appear Deadlocked
item.description: Investors parsed reports that President Trump told advisers that he was not satisfied with Iran’s latest proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: UPS Won’t Bring Packages to Their Doors. Some Are Fed Up.
item.description: The United Parcel Service will not deliver inside two buildings on Staten Island where its drivers were assaulted decades ago. Residents are suing.
